name: Maverick Storm 1 Flex
comment: Intense brightness enters the arena with the newest member of our Maverick Storm family of lighter, brighter, stadium-power moving heads built to rugged IP65 standards. A game-changing LED hybrid that projects a totally solid beam with no hot spot – even at its most narrow.

capabilities.comment: Reverse color scroll slow to fast
Reverse gobo scroll slow to fast
Reverse gobo rotation slow to fast
Reverse gobo scroll slow to fast

gwSpecs.description: Intense brightness enters the arena with the newest member of our Maverick Storm family of lighter, brighter, stadium-power moving heads built to rugged IP65 standards. A game-changing LED hybrid that projects a totally solid beam with no hot spot – even at its most narrow.
